calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Set For Trial On Jan-05-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mitch O. Onu, Esq. of the Law Offices of Mitch Onu, Tel. 650.299.9028, for defendant and moving party, via Court Call;
Andrew M. Massara, Esq. of Long & Levit LLP, Tel. 415.438.4423, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: Both parties stipulated to the judge pro tem. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PHILLIP LANE KIDWELL'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas is granted in part and denied in part. (1) Motion is granted as to the following: American Express #3 and Visa #3 and #7. The court does not find that the plaintiff's/cross-defendant's interest in obtaining general character evidence or evidence of habit is sufficient to overcome privacy interest in unrelated credit card charges over a five year period. In lieu of a protective order, the documents should be produced with account numbers redacted to include last four digits only. Further no credit card charges by Telisa Kidwell should be included or produced, because the subpoena is directed to charges by Phillip Kidwell, Jr. only. (2) The motion is denied as to quashing the subpoenas entirely and remaining categories. Telisa Kidwell is not a target of the subpoena; so no consumer records notice needed to be served upon her. Based on the defenses and cross complaint, the charges by defendant Phillip Kidwell over the two day period in question are relevant and subject to production. To the extent that defendant Kidwell has a privacy interest in those credit card charges, the privacy is waived as to the two-day period at issue in the case. (3) Request for sanctions is denied. Court finds substantial justification for the requests and objections. Parties are to meet and confer and agree on a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Continued To Jun-13-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT PHILLIP LANE KIDWELL's MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS is continued on the court's own motion to June 13, 2014. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Set For Trial On Jul-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
